defs: Abounding in grace or mercy; manifesting love, or bestowing mercy; characterized by grace; beneficent; merciful; disposed to show kindness or favor; condescending; as, his most gracious majesty.
quotes: A god ready to pardon, gracious and merciful.
So hallowed and so gracious in the time.

defs: Abounding in beauty, loveliness, or amiability; graceful; excellent.
quotes: Since the birth of Cain, the first male child, . . . There was not such a gracious creature born.

defs: Produced by divine grace; influenced or controlled by the divine influence; as, gracious affections.
